description: Colombian criminal organization dedicated to cocaine trafficking, terrorism, and murder. Founded in 1976 in Medellín by Pablo Escobar and other traffickers. It was one of the main actors in the Colombian armed conflict between 1980 and 1993, fighting the state and rival cartels. Considered the most dangerous criminal organization in Colombia, it was dismantled in 1993.

country_links.context: The Cartel de Medellín had a subsidiary in Ecuador.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los principales cabecillas del Cartel debieron refugiarse en Panamá
country_links.context: Cartel leaders took refuge in Panama and attempted negotiations there.

country_links.evidence_quote: traían base de cocaína de ... Perú
country_links.context: The cartel sourced base cocaine from Peru for processing.

country_links.evidence_quote: Gilberto Rodríguez Orejuela ... y Jorge Luis Ochoa ... fueron detenidos en España acusados de estar preparando redes de tráfico en Europa
country_links.context: Cartel members were detained in Spain for preparing trafficking networks in Europe.

country_links.evidence_quote: envíos de cocaína a los Estados Unidos, siendo Nueva York una de las principales ciudades
country_links.context: The cartel shipped cocaine to the United States, with New York as a primary destination.
